reviews.review_description:
Idk why no one mentioned but it’s scary af. I got stuck on a monster because of a BUG and my soul is about to exit my body. I wanted puzzles and adventure as it’s mentioned in the description but it’s sooo eerie. 
Want a refund. Don’t want monsters don’t want bugs.

So as of March 2026 this crap of a game is still abandoned seems like this group of devs do this with most of their games just making half baked slop, taking your money and, repeating the same tired cycle. VR is really getting long in the tooth for the amount of money spent just to start up and play. Won’t be buying a single thing from the idiotic devs ever again.
Game could have been great, great graphics and decent story but many bugs and unfortunately it was left abandoned with no updates since 2024 while they moved on to other games left abandoned as well

I love the story and explore mode but In explore mode i found a little glitch the water doesn’t go up from c deck, when I go up to B deck and try to go down (after it’s flooded) [it says area] is flooded that is good but b deck never floods I love the grand staircase and the hole ship with all the really good detail but please fix this or tell me how, if your thinking of getting the game I recommend I loved titanic for YEARS so this game suits me well thank you and good bye.

My game show a small print at the bottom saying
"this is a development build and not all levels are included."
No update since 2024 :-(
No save option so basically you pay to play the game but can't save. They won't give a refund either. Don't be scammed into this game

reviews.review_title: A good game that was left abandoned
reviews.review_description:
This a good game. It's a really good game. Do you know when the last time they updated it was? October 2024. 

Want to know why? The devs ditched it for a VR repo clone. It's very clear that this studio gave up on their passion project and decided it was more profitable to chase down a current fad.

No not buy. Unless it's on sale. The beauty of the Titanic's decks will likely remain completely and totally unfinished as the developers have left this game in the dust to rot.
Good quality game but needs to be multiplayer

Please add a comfort so i can get my money back i was trolled by my sister and boguht this game
Please i have not even played the game
Please devs please

For 20$ you would expect this to be a decent game. Well it’s not it is severely lacking in quality with bugs making it impossible to advance so you have to reload a checkpoint point and start all over again or the game bricks completely and as of 2025 they have not updated the game in over a year your money is best spent elsewhere and not on this trash fire

reviews.review_title: Abandoned with a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: The game is very good I love the idea the mechanics it was a solid good idea that I would gladly played it there was something was nice the visual is not bad the Titanic in the horror aspect was very interesting but it was abandoned sadly so one star
Just got this game less than 2 weeks ago and it’s really fun! Just wish you guys could update this more.

The game has a lot of bugs. The game isn't localized for the European market. The game hasn't been fully programmed since February 2024, but you only find out after you buy it. And they want $20 for it. And it's not that immersive, because there are a lot of invisible walls and predetermined paths. Overall, it seems a little cheeky to me. I don't recommend buying it.

One of the best VR experiences out there for someone like me who is a huge titanic fan but also a huge horror fan! when this game frost got announced i was over the moon and the release of it did not disappoint!! at first there were a few glitches but now they are patched alongside with the developers constantly adding new features including explore mode and new areas for explore mode.

I like this game. I think it’s fun and creepy and tense and I haven’t had any problems that other users have, until crawling through the vent and coming to the screwdriver and grate. The screws just spun indefinitely. THEN i realized i was turning righty tighty instead of lefty loosey!  When i twisted to the left they came right out!  I will add if you progress too quickly the dialogue skips to catch up which i found unfortunate. Sometimes the game forces a certain sequence where you have to trigger an event to progress which I also don’t like. I wish we saw more of the titanic. Also, when the game is loading, a footnote says it’s a work in progress. I wasn’t aware of that when purchasing and it looks like the last developer post is a year ago which I find concerning.  I just fell out of the map for the first time, essentially crashing the game. I think that’s about all for the negative. Will update when finished if need be.  Finished!  Game crashed one more time. I haven’t checked out the explore mode yetbut recommend this game to anyone looking for an indepth story and figuring things out in a tense atmosphere. Not sure what to say without goving anything away.   Look forward to more to come.
Best VR game ever

Game spontaneously erased my saves. I’m sick and tired this happening in too many VR games .

What’s the point of playing if your progress gonna get wiped out
Sure, it has bugs, just like pretty much any other game. They could be fixed, and they haven't done much. Just because there are a few problems in it doesn't mean that it deserves 1 star.

If you like anything to do with the Titanic your going to love this one.
Its a game based on time travel which again makes its so intriguing and pretty addictive to play. It does have its little quirks here and there and i say quirks rather than bugs because its more a case of getting used to how it all works.
The Titanic itself is superb and the explore mode is fantastic.
Definitely a captivating game and i highly recommend it.
I can’t play this. I got stuck on the tutorial level and can’t get past the submarine part I want a refund

reviews.review_title: I could only play 3 minutes so far 😭
reviews.review_description: It’s so scary I couldnt like bro the moment I walk into the water the lights flash and I’m gone.
I love this game I got it day one and forgot to write a review but I beg you devs please make a sequel
This has so much potential but seemingly has been abandoned unfortunately...cannot recommend purchasing until the bugs are fixed.
Great titanic game
This game is amazing and so realistic. It actually feels like you are standing in the water. Definitely worth the money.

reviews.review_title: Don't Buy UNTIL They FIX Bugs!
reviews.review_description:
Ok. I made one review after being annoyed at the constant restart from new game: 

How come every time I get far into the game, I go to play again the next day and it starts the game completely over from scratch?? No continue game.. only new game and the starting scene again. 
It's getting annoying!!  It's done it 3 times already!   If it happens again I'm just gonna give up.  I'd really like to make it to the end though.  Geez.  What is going on!!

New update: 
Finally was able to finish the game.  Which wasn't long enough at all!   The only reason it took me as long as it did was because of the issues stated above! 
The very end of the game, last level is just annoying.  The constant switching back and forth to each character. It ruined the ending.  Plus. Wtf?? What kind of ending is that?  It left me saying "is that it?"   Left me confused about the one monster at the end.  I didn't know what happened to the Diana chick I was searching for the entire game.  Nothing. 

As for the explore mode.  
Don't even bother.  I tried to sink so many times, even at 10x speed.. and it never fills up past the E deck stairs. If you go up one level of stairs. The water just disappears.  It says you can't go back down because it's flooded.  But there is no water.    I thought maybe it was just a bug.  I'll try again.  And again. And again. I just want to see what happens when it sinks.  But you can never get to it.  

I'm so mad I even paid $20 for this game. 😒  not worth it. Also I noticed I didn't see ANY of the negative reviews when I went to buy it. And I searched for any. Always do before I buy a game.  Now that I finish the game I see them all. And they are all correct. FIRST: the slow moving is so painful and you're so short almost at floor level.  Gameplay needs more movement freedom and faster walking.  Handling anything is annoying.  Trying to grab your comm device is annoying. Also why can't we hold more than one item/or keep an item?  It drops and u don't get it again.  Flashlight dies too fast.  If you drop something, which you will a LOT, it disappears. Just gone.   You can't grip the door handles good enough to help you with the one monster near the end.  When you have to open the water tight doors with the heater lamp parts.  It will not work right.  Even if you get all of the 3 lamps in the wall.  You go to open the watertight door and it's still saying the very first subtitles/instructions.  After trying several times it finally works and gets to the point it's supposed to.  That's another thing.  You can't progress at all unless you listen to the whole speech again on each level.  Even if u died and already know what to do.  Nothing works until you listen to the whole spew again.   It makes it long and drawn out for no reason.  You should be able to skip the talking/instructions.  Especially if you already died and redoing that part.  

Also. Why can't we go to the BACK of the boat on explore mode??  Only the front side decks. ?  That's exactly where everyone will want to go if this is supposed to be the titanic. The back of the boat!!!    

Anyway.  I'm only going to keep this in my library to HOPE they fix everything soon.  And add more stuff to do.  Plz add more and fix the explore/sinking.  
Also add more places to explore.  

Also plz make it more free play during the game.  It basically makes you do exactly what it says step by step. U can't progress unless you stay right in line with the story.  That's not fun. When you want to try to figure it out on ur own. U want to mess up and try to get it right.  If you're telling me what to do every step of the way it takes the fun and mystery out of it.  I feel like it just did everything for me and I was just walking along with the story line.   So it's not hard at all.   It's basically just a jump scare once in awhile.  Which the monsters/creatures could be much scarier if they actually moved around more freely as well. 

This game has so much potential.  I don't want to be disappointed.  I wanted to love this game because it's the Titanic. But most of the locations don't even look like the Titanic.  Just the outside of the ship does. Add more of the actual Titanic scenes. Plz. 

If it gets better any time I will come back and give it all stars and a better Review.   It's obvious the people that gave the perfect reviews never even played the game.  I actually Gave it 3 stars after the first issues of restarting from scratch and not saving My progress if I took my headset off.  But now I came back and Gave it 2 because of that ending and the sinking not working at all. 
I really want to love this game.  I hope they're actually reading these REAL reviews.
Fun being on the titanic :]

I was working my way through this until I got to the elevator level. The elevator handle is not available. I reviewed walkthroughs and see where it is supposed to be but it is not there. So, I am stuck and cannot finish the game. I wish they could update to get rid of some of these bugs.
Wish I could give it a half a star! Not worth it. I want my money back!
Wish I could rate it even less.
The game is very buggy. I can't play it as the screws will not fall out of the grate. It really needs polishing when it comes to veiws out of windows and is very dark in areas it dont have to be.
This game is so awesome I'm a huge fan of the ship and if you ever really wanted to explore the real titanic this is the game for you

reviews.review_title: Great game for titanic hyper fixation
reviews.review_description: I don’t play this game often but when I do I don’t stop I have a very big hyper fixation on titanic and this is amazing the graphics are pc level on literally a quest 2 3 or 3s you should buy this game it’s amazing updates push out slow though and the game isint finished so don’t be leaving 1star reviews being all like “this game is terrible don’t buy” cause girly you know that ain’t true

I got the game. I beat the game and I loved every second of it. The grabbing I got used too almost immediately. I do use quests games optimizer so I know that played a role in how gorgeous the game is on quest 3 but I'm seeing alot of bad reviews...like how ?? They must not have made it past level 1 or something but yes. you've gotta use ur brain and it's a horror game. And the devs have done a splendid job. This was a Great vr experience. Never crashed on me although I did have to restart 1 section because my hand got stuck in the vent level lol but it only happened once. other than that the game is awesome give it a shot while it's on sale I bet you'll get scared

reviews.review_title: Good game but lots of bugs.
reviews.review_description: This is a very good game but has very much amount of bugs and that one part where I had the place the bulb in and open the door before he breaks in the waterdoor just doesn't work and I die and I had to press new game and it still doesn't work and on YouTube it work's for everybody except me.
Mechanics have some issues, but they are slight and easy to overcome. What you get in return - is a beautiful, scary, and immersive experience. Highly recommend.

This game can be a 4-5 stars depending on your take on Horror. I played great horror games but the michanics of the game ruined it for me. 

#1 issue your grabbing michanics are terrible!!! The worst I've played so far it was so bad it made the game unenjoyable. I stopped when I couldn't "push" the box out of the way by the elevators

#2 the puzzles are ok depending on who you are I don't care for them because they were more annoying;however that could be because your grabbing michanics ruined the experience for me.

3. When it got scarry I was scared then was quickly reminded when trying to grab anything it was bad. 

4. I played for 1hr and 12 min great potential but disappointed.
This is a perfect game if you like boats and horror I give this 5 stars
Beautiful looking game with some great puzzles that aren't too difficult. Really looking forward to what this developer's has in-store for us next
Best quest game ever nice seeing the ship sink with incredible graphics 11/10

reviews.review_title: A Game on a ship full of mysteries
reviews.review_description: I bought the game after reading the reviews. The game definitely plays into the mind. I haven’t made it through the story. Primarily because I share the quest and those others have restarted my story quest numerous times. I wish the developers would implement a save game feature so more then one person could play a game and save their progress, instead of having their progress reset every time someone hits “New Game”. Other than that it’s a good game. It definitely makes you feel like you’re in the environment and the graphics are good. The water graphics are among the best I’ve seen on a quest game so far.

I recently bought this game but yet have not made it through the story and all u have to say is that I don’t get scared at horror games very often but this game made me terrified and I am a huge titanic fan although this game made some tweaks to your surroundings I absolutely loved it and cannot wait ti try the explore mode
One of my favorite vr games

reviews.review_title: Seems good, but atm has some flaws.
reviews.review_description:
Though I  just bought this one yesterday, from what I've played so far, the gameplay seems a bit lacking (the flashlight dies WAY too quickly in a game that's already too dark. Being blind does not equal scary, and actually makes the game more frustrating than fun. The intereractions also need more polish as everything you grab is held a bit awkwardly, but a much bigger issue than that for me is the items you keep on your shoulders.
The game says your light will always be on your left shoulder and acquired items on your right, but BOTH items are on BOTH shoulders, and your current inventory item is always over your light. This means that if you want to use your light or scanner (i.e; your ONLY SOURCE OF GOOD LIGHTING AND LITERAL PROTECTION), you have to first pull out the item with one hand and grab your light/ scanner with the other.. this actually got me killed once and is annoying even outside of a creature coming around you....
I also wish there were a few more settings to adjust in-game for things like the subtitles. 
There's zero reason subtitles should be forced with no way of toggling them off.
Also, though not an issue really, no matter how I adjusted my floor level, the ground in-game is always well above the ground level (me touching the floor in real life makes me elboy deep in the game.)

I truly hope the game keeps getting patched up, because I'd love to enjoy it a bit more than I do in it's current state.
I think it’s a good game but also can have an explore mode and and escape mode without the horror and just to see if you are worthy enough to make it out alive from the icy water.

reviews.review_title: One of my 2nd games and fav
reviews.review_description: Wish you made more

The game is awesome! Of course it has its bugs unfortunately but hopefully the devs fix those and release the explore mode soon!! The game is scary thooo 😅 so be prepared and remember that it’s just a game lol also, how do I unlock the chapter mode?

Update: so explore mode has been released but just beware the titanic is not fully explotable yet, you basically can explore what you have access to in the story mode! They did say they’ll be releasing new areas! Also you unlock chapter mode by beating the story!

reviews.review_title: Want to love it so very much
reviews.review_description:
Love the idea, absolutely love all things titanic 
Fantastic graphics & sound design 
Great setting for a horror/puzzle explorer game 

My only gripe is a pretty big one & that's the interaction with objects ..doors ..keys etc etc ..there's no weight to it ..u just grab & hope & a lot of the time the object vanishes into a wall etc  & while I understand it's still in development I really hope the Devs work on this because it's a true immersion killer 

The atmosphere is fantastic & I've no doubt the Devs will work on the bugs & when that happens along with the ability to explore freely the most well known ship in history they will truly have an incredible game on there hands 

Great work so far all involved 

Just an idea while experiencing the sinking exploration sim couldn't the hallways etc be off kilter ..strange angles etc & have the ability to switch that off or on in comfort settings for those wishing to fully immerse & truly feel terror & disorientation 

Carl ☺️

This has to be one of the scariest if not the scariest game I’ve ever played. I’ve never been on edge with any other horror game than I am with this one. It’s to the point where I actually had to stop playing because I was so scared that I felt like I was gonna cry.

What an amazing 🤩 experience I have been waiting a very long time for a Titanic Game to be available for standalone!! 

What a truly wonderful and immersive experience, with some wonderful jump scares along the way! 

Titanic lovers you need this game! And for you puzzle gamers that love the horror vibe this is so for you! 

And Exploration mode what an amazing touch 🙌

Remember this is a game still in development and has been created by a team of only 2 devs. It’s a huge achievement to bring us a game whereby standalone users can access a Titanic game 🔥 

I believe the Exploration mode will unlock towards the end of the month (Feb) 

5 stars 🌟 🌟🌟🌟🌟wonderful! Amazing job devs I was truly immersed in the experience

reviews.review_title: BEST VR GAME OF THE YEAR!!
reviews.review_description: The graphics are amazing the deatils of the ship and crew is amazing. I enjoy being able to climb and manually do work. I love the story line and the time traveling that was the best. If you dont have the game buy it. Its worth the price and youll have a balst plying it.

This game really stands out in graphics and visuals, it's one of the few out there on standalone headsets that make use of light, reflections and some shadows whichs adds to the immersion. The bugs however are a bit of buzzkill. Some are major bugs like inability to walk in certain locations and you have to walk in your room/play area to pass that location. Also, Going back to previous locations triggers previous tasks all over again which is confusing, most likley a bug.  

Adding few features would be appreicated if this game is still in development: picking up objects from a short distance, skipping intros especially if you are going to reload a  checkpoint/chapter, and having an option to view a map or current task all the time. 

Hoping there are improvements in the works because this game has potential.

Update: this game is advertised as like 6-7 hours by the devs on Reddit. Make no mistake I beat it in 2-3 hours and I am certain that an hour of that was just dying due to game breaking bugs. Grasping objects and getting stuck is a real issue and the ending is abrupt and unclear. They introduce a dead sprite of a character late in the game and it’s never explained and then randomly end game happens and that’s it. No clear explanation as to what was going on. The game literally falls apart in end game with them flaunting the “room from the movie” at one point. Are you kidding me. 

I love titanic, but holy crap. 

——————

I’ll keep this short. Love everything titanic. Graphics on this are good enough for stand alone quest abilities. Water is impressive and the sinking element is well done to add drama to the puzzle solving elements. Ship is beautifully recreated and I can’t wait for the exploration mode to wander around more freely. 

I haven’t finished this yet — but Probably more technical limitation but lack of basically anyone else in those game tends to ruin immersion a bit. 

Too many bugs for a release they hyped up all over Reddit. Offered to beta test, never heard back and have been consistently breaking the game while playing it. I clip through walls, my hands get stuck behind closed doors, the story is very linear in which you can’t progress unless you trigger unclear objectives on walls (literally was stuck 15 minutes in a tight hallway with a monster dying over and over  because the game bugged out because I did not trigger a lever on a wall that needed to fire off a useless commentary before I could solve the puzzle specifically in that order). Needless to say at points because the objective was so unclear (even though I explicitly did the direction but missed a small dialogue trigger sub-step) could not progress and basically spent a few rounds dying and waving at the monster. Monster is very low-res and not very detailed actually and now I’m desensitized to him from being trapped from progressing due to bad game design. 

It’s not fully baked, and really buggy but if they can fix the bugs it has potential but it’s 3 stars because it’s clear they didn’t do QA testing or their testers just wanted a free game and never actually tried to break it. Sad thing was I wasn’t trying to break it and just found a buggy mess. 

The game literally says on the homescreen that it’s an October 2023 build for a February 2024 release. What was done the last few months ??

Titanic A Space Between had me screaming in ways I never thought possible 😅 Exploring the ship is incredibly immersive. I have a quick review if you're interested.

https://youtu.be/ZpAJqhGMWK4

It's worth it, and I am having a ton of fun even though ghosts are my greatest fear 👻😱

reviews.review_title: Actually so good so far but…
reviews.review_description: I heard there was a Explorer mode without monsters I was excited to see it as I couldn’t finish the game as I got to scared lol. I can’t find it anywhere can anybody help me?

I have just bought this game, I was expecting a lot but definitely did and it’s fantastic and great game, I am really enjoying to story and the way the game plays, a few minor issues but nothing to worry about, keep up the great work and add more updates please 😊

I ain’t being paid by no one this is a proper review. It’s really cool and the graphics look amazing, I personally have not experienced any glitches Or lag. I am a bit annoyed that explore mod is not out tho
Great game but add multiplayer!!

This game is decent. I get it is in early development still, so most of the problems should be fixed soon, but it has potential.
First, the visuals of the Titanic are stunning even though in some parts, the rooms are to empty and ruin the look.
The horror gets you especially at the mid point of the game hearing the flute sounds scare me as I don't know what I'm gonna see but when I find out you don't get jumpscared when you die ruined the horror of getting chased especially in the part with the longed arm creature I wasn't scared when I was in the hall with him I was annoyed and he doesn't even kill you he just pushes you and he even kicked me out the map. You need to add jumpscares to make it more scary.
You need to fix the transition into new chapters like when you time travel it's horrible due to the cut to the black screen and then crappy load into the next part of the game and it shows in scenes where you open the door and you screen just freezes and then cuts black it needs better transitions
The water is alright. In my opinion, it's just basic water physics it needs more work put in it, but in the final plunge part the tention of trying to find a way up the grand staircase while the water is rising is amazing but in other parts it rarely gets to me other than the boiler room scene that's why after the long arm creature bit I started really enjoying the game.
I don't suggest buying this game yet. I think I will wait for future updates and bug fixes to buy it
Also, fix the long arm creature he doesn't look scary, and when you see his face, it's just scuffed, put some more work into him.
And the games 2 hour run time think  need an extra hour as I really wanted more horror parts of getting chased and i really would of like a part in the steam engine room with the long armed creature I fell he more belongs in a bigger room like that than just a few hall ways
Just what I was expecting! Just like Under depths of fear! I love it so much the titanic sinking which is a horror by its self, But monsters too! 10/10
I love the titanic game isn’t perfect but if they fix some of the bugs and added co op it would be the best vr game
I love horror when I played this I peed my pants I love this game
Great story great ending just wish there were more endings and multiplayer
Hard to grab inventory items. Also hard to grab stuff you are supposed to use.

reviews.review_title: Interesting idea but needs some polish
reviews.review_description:
The are currently two modes, a game with story and a free roam mode.
My biggest problem with the game is that the controls feel sluggish much of the time. Sometimes important items will vanish before you can use them (matches for example).
Climbing can be a real chore and in one section where you’re avoiding flowing water it seems too easy to lose your grip leading to an irritating need to repeat a section over and over.

The exploration component is hindered by darkness in many parts. It makes sense in the game mode for atmosphere but not so much for just exploring areas.

It was interesting but it’s the kind of game you’ll likely play once and not want to play again due to the frustrating mechanics. And no, the graphics are not PCVR quality!

This Titanic themed Horror Game is the most immersive Game I have experienced so far.
The Graphics and sounds of the surrounding is giving me chills.
The story is well made and it makes you tense every second of the Game.

Just a really well made Horror Game with Unbelievably good Graphics and Sounds.


I love this Game 🥰

I really enjoy delving into the history of Titanic so when I saw that there was a game on the quest headset based on the Titanic, it was a no-brainer for me. Yes, the main game is a fictionalized version which is aboard the Titanic (pretty good story from what I played so far) but the main draw for me was the free roam of the Titanic. However there is one thing that keeps me from giving top marks to this game and that is that I feel sick after playing it. It only happens in this game and not any other similar games. I am only on the third mission and will give another try and hopefully I will not feel sick.

Great game, I love supporting small devs and these guys deserve it, the games really fun, the horror hits really well, with really good sound which really carries for horror, relying more on dread than cheap jump scares, which is something I really respect, plus it’s funny to say “yeah I have a vr horror game about the titanic”

🚨 Remove the spaces http:// tiny. cc/ Titanic25 then put that in your browser, enjoy!

If you found this helpful than leaving a like would really help me out 
👇

Dont listen to youtubers like uploadvr & beardo banjo. Or that Asian girl… they get games free from devs.. 99% of Their review are misrepresented.

Having said that.. this game needs more time in the oven. You play it now and you will be let down. Graphics look like 2013. I found no jump scares. The low poly just takes the Emerson out

I was very underwhelmed by this game - the game should be described at best as “Titanic themed” as for the most part, interiors are generic ship corridors and cabins that bear no resemblance to the actual ship. The areas that have been modelled such as the grand staircase or boat deck are of exceptionally poor quality. They didn’t even put a clock in the grand staircase! Historical accuracy is completely lacking with a great deal of artistic license taken regarding the ships equipment. 

As a game it looks unfinished and sloppy. I also found the controls cumbersome- accessing the control device took several attempts each time and moving fast involves wiggling arms up and down which felt silly. The scaling also seemed totally off, I had to stand in a box to feel like I was at the correct height. Otherwise you appear to be about 4 ft tall. The sinking was perhaps the worst element, on my run through it didn’t even sink. Just seemed stuck midway through. 

I’m surprised meta allow this stuff on their store considering the quality.

reviews.review_title: Been excite for months for this one
reviews.review_description: Love it, my kind of game,  super cool and action packed suspense .update......wow game is gorgeous,  beautiful graphics and plenty of eye candy to be seen, shiny brass and silver pipes oh man feels like I'm in a luxury cruise ship, very suspenseful and a be creepy love the dialog and audio, game is a epic adventure and so immersive as u dive into the story. Highly recommend buying this now and no cheesy code from me lol. It's spectacular in everyway.  I like how 1 star clueless whinny   reviewers try to discredit and question 5 star reviews. Don't read those reviews they are extremely illogical and more than likely fanboys of a competitor or just lack ability to play certain games, probably got too scared and ran away . Lol game is fantastic 👏 👌

There is a great game here. The visuals looking amazing on Q3. Shame I can't play it as there are bugs quite early on which disable locomotion in certain areas. I don't regret buying it as I'm confident the devs will fix this in time.

Absolutely amazing! 
IV had many app lab games and some can be dodgy however occasionally you come across gems like atlas and this little stunner of a game ! 
Aboard the titanic as it's sinking the rapidly rising water is an enemy and worse yet the horrors that pursue you ! 
The atmosphere is amazing, graphics are amazing and story is phenomenal! 

Follow the link tree in my bio for 25 percent off
I did explore mode and the ship wasn’t sinking it was but but when the water was halfway or something it just stops so uhm I did the sinking at 10x and it didn’t sink

I 100% recommend this game. The graphics are nice, the mood is scary, and the puzzles are well crafted.. I won't lie, I yelled a couple of times as I am a scraredy cat and get spooked easily. I liked the storytelling and the going back and forth between characters.  The fact that they made a game like this based on real life events makes it even more fun and immersive.

reviews.review_title: Very good but I'm a wimp.
reviews.review_description: The developers have done a very good job, to the point that it's too much for me to handle. I played the exploration mode for a while and I was too sick with nerves because of the sound design to go on. I may have to refund and consider coming back at a later date. Highly recommend.
I'm not one for horror games or spooky games. But I do like puzzles. I'll admit there was a few jump scares that made me stop the game. But that just kept me on my toes and kept me wanting more.
Good game but could be longer maybe witness tbe iceberg hit then the panic of being on the boat
It’s my favorite game of all my games, so fun and a great adventure and not hard, no complicated puzzles thank god, just fun and exciting
